title: <div>  3.  Demonstrating mastery through class participation or performance on k
content:
3. Demonstrating mastery through class participation or performance on key tasks.

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages students to engage more deeply instead of just “doing the minimum.”
• Prevents students from being dragged down by one or two bad assignments.

3️⃣ Workload Balancing & Making Sure This Isn’t Busy Work

Now, let’s ensure that the paths are balanced in terms of workload.
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 69 (chunk 69/108)
